questions.question: How can I reduce my energy consumption?
questions.answer: You can activate the automatic saving mode, configure schedules for your devices, and regularly review your consumption reports.

questions.question: What do high consumption notifications mean?
questions.answer: These notifications alert you when your consumption exceeds the usual average, helping you identify possible issues or waste.

questions.question: How do automatic reports work?
questions.answer: Reports are generated according to the frequency you choose and are sent to your email in the selected format.

help.title: Help Center
help.subtitle: How can we help you?
help.successMessage: Message sent successfully. We will respond soon.

items.title: System Introduction
items.description: Learn the basics of the energy management system
steps: On Home you'll see today's consumption in kWh and your estimated monthly bill.
Alerts warn you when your consumption goes above the expected average.
The side menu takes you to Devices, Reports, and Settings.

items.title: Configure saving mode
items.description: How to activate and customize automatic saving
steps: In Device Preferences you can enable monitoring by category.
Set a monthly kWh threshold as your savings goal.
Enable high-consumption alerts to get automatic warnings.

items.title: Read consumption reports
steps: The weekly chart shows your consumption in kWh day by day.
The monthly history compares your latest periods to spot trends.
The device ranking shows you which devices consume the most energy.

items.title: Connect devices
steps: Go to Devices and select 'Add device'.
Assign a category and location to keep them organized.
You can turn each device on or off from its card.
